data.title: Binance Alpha will list R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30th.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will list R2 Protocol (R2) on March 30th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens on Alpha. Further details will be announced separately.

data.title: Iranian President Praises Pakistan's Peace Efforts, Calls for Trust in Negotiations
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi has commended Pakistan for its efforts towards peace, according to Jin10. In a communication with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, Raisi emphasized the importance of trust in negotiations. The Iranian leader's remarks highlight the ongoing diplomatic engagements between the two countries, aiming to foster regional stability and cooperation.

data.title: Polymarket and Parti.com have entered into a strategic partnership to launch the first live prediction market.
data.description: Polymarket and Parti.com have announced a strategic partnership to launch the first product integrating real-time prediction markets into the live streaming experience. Starting today, streamers and their viewers can directly discover, follow, and trade prediction markets on Polymarket within the Parti.com platform without leaving the platform. Through this integration, content creators can search all markets offered by the Polymarket infrastructure and "pin" selected markets to the top of the live chat window, allowing viewers to instantly participate in market transactions related to the live discussion topics. The partnership also launches the Earn Program, where creators can earn a share of the transaction fees generated by their viewers in pinned markets. Furthermore, the two companies will collaborate on "Boutique Culture Markets" around trending events in the live streaming ecosystem, extending prediction markets to cultural hot topics on the digital platform; these markets are already online. Parti founder and CEO Brian Gallagher stated that prediction markets are not just financial tools, but also a new media format, and combining live streaming culture with Polymarket represents the next wave of media trends. Polymarket Chief Marketing Officer Matthew Modabber stated that live streaming is a natural extension of Polymarket's mission to build a global information layer for real-time events, and the two companies are bringing the market into the context and audiences that shape real-time narratives.

data.title: Iranian President and Pakistani Prime Minister Discuss Regional Tensions and Peace Efforts
data.description: Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi and Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif engaged in a conversation lasting over an hour to address regional tensions and explore peace initiatives. According to Jin10, the discussion focused on the current geopolitical climate and potential collaborative efforts to promote stability in the region. Both leaders emphasized the importance of dialogue and cooperation in resolving conflicts and fostering a peaceful environment. The call reflects ongoing diplomatic efforts to address regional challenges and enhance bilateral relations between Iran and Pakistan.

data.title: Study Reveals $143 Million in Abnormal Profits from Polymarket Trades
data.description: A recent study has identified over 210,000 suspicious trades on Polymarket, resulting in $143 million in abnormal profits for traders with insider information between 2024 and 2026. According to NS3.AI, the authors of the study suggest that this figure is a conservative estimate, as the methodology used may include false positives and potentially overlook some instances of suspicious trading.

data.title: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards: Targeted U.S. Support Ship Far from Oman’s Salalah Port
data.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have announced that they targeted a U.S. support ship located at a considerable distance from Oman’s Salalah Port. According to Jin10, the incident highlights ongoing tensions in the region, with Iran asserting its military capabilities. The specifics of the operation and the implications for regional security remain unclear, but the announcement underscores the volatile nature of U.S.-Iran relations. The Revolutionary Guards did not provide further details on the engagement or the current status of the vessel involved.

data.title: Xinhua News Agency: California bans officials from profiting from insider information in prediction markets.
data.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed a law on the 27th prohibiting state officials appointed by the governor from profiting from insider information in prediction markets. The governor's office stated that some U.S. officials with apparent access to sensitive federal government information were making "extremely precise bets" in prediction markets. The statement also criticized some officials for turning public service into a means of "getting rich quick." The statement pointed out that four cases of prediction trading demonstrate that it is highly unlikely for someone lacking insider information to make such trades. The profits from these predictions ranged from tens of thousands to millions of dollars, involving multiple U.S. military actions related to Venezuela and Iran, with some predictions made just days before the actions took place or hours before. Six individuals suspected of having insider information bet on a U.S. military strike against Iran, profiting a total of $1.2 million, and they opened prediction market accounts just days before the conflict occurred. (Xinhua)

data.title: BitGo Reports $81.6 Billion in Digital Assets Under Custody
data.description: BitGo disclosed in its annual Form 10-K filing that it managed approximately $81.6 billion in digital assets as of December 31 last year. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin constituted 49.2% of the assets under custody, while the top five assets made up 80.7% of the total holdings.

data.title: Major Wall Street Exchanges Announce Tokenization Plans
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that while attention remains on Bitcoin prices, three major Wall Street exchanges have quietly made a historic shift within 48 hours. The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), Nasdaq, and the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME), which are pivotal to global capital markets, have simultaneously announced their respective tokenization upgrade plans. The move marks a significant step in the integration of blockchain technology into traditional financial systems, reflecting a growing trend towards digital asset adoption.

data.title: Astronaut Faces Medical Emergency on International Space Station
data.description: The International Space Station (ISS) experienced its first medical evacuation since it began hosting rotating astronaut crews in November 2000. According to Ming Pao, U.S. astronaut Mike Fincke was involved in the incident, which occurred in mid-January this year. Fincke revealed that he suddenly lost the ability to speak while aboard the ISS, and the cause of this condition remains unknown.

data.title: Research: Polymarket's "informed" traders have reaped $143 million in illicit profits since 2024.
data.description: Researchers at Columbia Law School and the University of Haifa analyzed most of Polymarket's trading data between 2024 and 2026, finding over 210,000 suspicious trades that generated $143 million in profits for "informed" traders. Published this month, the study is the first to estimate the total profits of suspicious accounts. Researchers used five criteria related to trading timing and bet amount to screen accounts that made large bullish bets shortly before news releases. The study defined these actions as "informed" trading rather than "insider" trading because some of the flagged large trades occurred in markets with numerous influencing factors, such as those related to the 2024 US election. Most of the top 20 most suspicious trades flagged were related to the 2024 election results, involving approximately $16 million in profits; the remainder involved Federal Reserve decisions and sporting events. Harry Crane, a statistics professor at Rutgers University, questioned the study's methodology, arguing that its suspiciousness ranking relied too heavily on profitability. The study authors acknowledged that the methodology may have included over- or under-inclusion scenarios and characterized the identified suspicious trading volume as a "conservative lower bound estimate of abnormal profits." Polymarket announced earlier this month a ban on trading using "stolen confidential information" and "illegal tips," but its offshore exchange does not collect user names or other identifying information, and the method of enforcement remains unclear.

data.title: Kuwait International Airport Faces Drone Attacks Causing Radar Damage
data.description: Kuwait International Airport has been targeted by multiple drone attacks, according to the Kuwait News Agency. According to Odaily, the attacks have caused significant damage to the airport's radar system. Fortunately, no injuries have been reported as a result of these incidents.

data.title: BNB Chain: The first phase of the BNB Beacon Chain recovery tool will end in 3 days.
data.description: BNB Chain announced on the X platform that the first phase of the BNB Beacon Chain recovery tool will cease operation in 3 days. Users holding BEP2 tokens on BNB Beacon Chain should migrate them to BSC as soon as possible to expedite processing.

data.title: The Israeli military deployed more than 50 warplanes to strike Iranian nuclear facilities and weapons bases.
data.description: The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) issued a statement on the 28th, saying that on the 27th, the IDF deployed more than 50 warplanes to strike nuclear facilities and weapons bases in three regions of Iran. The statement said the operation consisted of three waves of strikes lasting several hours, targeting a heavy water plant in Arak, a special facility in Yazd used for producing explosive materials needed for uranium enrichment, and a weapons production base. (Xinhua)

data.title: Pakistan to Host Four-Nation Foreign Ministers Meeting on Middle East Stability
data.description: Pakistan is set to host a four-nation foreign ministers meeting in Islamabad on March 30, involving Turkey, Egypt, and Saudi Arabia, to discuss ways to ease tensions in the Middle East and promote regional stability. According to Jin10, Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif stated on March 27 that Pakistan is making sincere and comprehensive diplomatic efforts to help end the Middle East conflict, aiming to shield regional countries from its devastating consequences. Pakistan's Defense Minister Khawaja Asif mentioned that Pakistan is working alongside Egypt and Turkey towards the goal of ending the Middle East war. Additionally, Pakistan's Foreign Minister Dar noted on March 26 that indirect negotiations between the United States and Iran are being facilitated through Pakistan's communication channels.

data.title: ICAO Implements New Regulations on Portable Chargers for Air Travel
data.description: The International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) announced new regulations on Friday, October 27, concerning the use of portable chargers on aircraft. According to Ming Pao, passengers are now limited to carrying a maximum of two portable charging devices, commonly referred to as 'power banks,' on flights. Additionally, charging these devices during the flight is prohibited to enhance passenger and aviation safety.

data.title: Iranian Official: Kharg Island Security Stable Amid Ongoing Oil Exports
data.description: On March 28, according to Jin10, Iranian Parliament's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee spokesperson, Ebrahim Rezai, stated that the security situation on Kharg Island is stable, with normal living conditions and ongoing oil exports. Rezai, along with some members of the committee, visited Kharg Island on the same day. He warned that any attacks on Kharg Island would be met with a firm response from Iran.

data.title: Hyperliquid Platform Whale Holdings Reach $3.5 Billion
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass reveals that the Hyperliquid platform's whale currently holds positions valued at $3.5 billion. The long positions amount to $1.732 billion, representing 49.48% of the total, while short positions stand at $1.768 billion, accounting for 50.52%. The long positions have incurred a loss of $117 million, whereas the short positions have gained $141 million.

Notably, a significant whale address, 0xa5b0..41, has engaged in a 15x leveraged long position on ETH at a price of $2,148.7, currently facing an unrealized loss of $10.1015 million.

data.title: U.S. Air Force C-17A Makes Emergency Landing in Turkey, Russian Sources Report
data.description: According to Jin10, a U.S. Air Force C-17A Globemaster III transport aircraft made an emergency landing in Turkey, as reported by Russian sources on March 27. The aircraft reportedly took off from near the Greek island of Kos and issued a distress signal while in Turkish airspace. The specific reason for the emergency landing has not been disclosed by the sources. The U.S. has not yet responded to these reports.

data.title: Ukraine Seeks Trilateral Talks Amid Challenges
data.description:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky emphasized the country's ongoing efforts to facilitate trilateral talks involving Ukraine, the United States, and Russia. According to RTHK, Zelensky expressed willingness to hold meetings at any location. In an interview with Ukrainian media, Zelensky stated that Ukraine maintains daily communication with the U.S., although he acknowledged facing difficulties in the process. He described himself more as a mediator in the negotiation process rather than a direct party to the conflict.

Zelensky disclosed that due to the situation in the Middle East, the U.S. can only conduct negotiations within its own borders for security reasons. Meanwhile, Russia has expressed willingness to meet anywhere outside the United States. Zelensky reiterated Ukraine's commitment to facilitating talks at any venue.

Russian Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov recently stated that Russia remains interested in negotiations and hopes to hold a new round of talks as soon as conditions permit.
